LinkedIn.step_1: Navega a tu Página de Empresa o Showcase de LinkedIn

LinkedIn.step_3: O pega un URN completo como urn:li:organization:123 o urn:li:organizationBrand:456

Insights.title: Insights y Recomendaciones
Insights.subtitle: Obtén recomendaciones personalizadas para mejorar tu contenido
Insights.timing_rec_1: Publica los martes y miércoles entre 9:00-11:00 para máxima interacción
Insights.timing_rec_2: Los fines de semana (sábado-domingo) son adecuados para contenido personal e inspirador
Insights.timing_rec_3: Evita publicar entre 13:00-15:00 - horas ocupadas con baja interacción
Insights.content_rec_1: Crea contenido visual con historias personales - aumenta la interacción en un 45%
Insights.content_rec_2: Añade videos tutoriales cortos (30-60 segundos) - formato popular
Insights.content_rec_3: Comparte contenido detrás de escena para conexión auténtica con la audiencia
Insights.keywords_rec_1: #ConsejosProfesionales #Inspiración #Emprendimiento - los hashtags más populares en el campo
Insights.keywords_rec_2: Usa tendencias actuales pero de manera relevante para tu marca
Insights.keywords_rec_3: Crea hashtags únicos para tu marca para construir una comunidad
Insights.strategy_rec_1: Desarrolla una estrategia de contenido mensual con 70% contenido original, 30% contenido compartido
Insights.strategy_rec_2: Construye colaboraciones con influencers en tu campo
Insights.strategy_rec_3: Enfócate en construir una comunidad activa en lugar de solo aumentar el número de seguidores
Insights.performance_rec_1: Tus publicaciones reciben mayor interacción los martes y miércoles
Insights.performance_rec_2: El contenido visual recibe 2x más interacción que el contenido textual
Insights.trends_rec_1: La tendencia #IA está en auge - considera incorporarla en tu contenido
Insights.trends_rec_2: El contenido detrás de escena es muy popular esta semana - aprovecha la oportunidad
Insights.no_performance_data: Aún no hay datos de rendimiento
Insights.no_trends_data: No hay datos de tendencias disponibles

CookieConsent.title: Cookies and similar technologies
CookieConsent.description: We use essential mechanisms to run the service, and — only with your consent — analytics tools and the support chat widget. You can accept all, reject non-essential cookies, or customise your choices at any time.
CookieConsent.legal_links: For details, see our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> (including GDPR information and notice under Israeli law where applicable) and <terms>Terms of Use</terms>.
CookieConsent.toggle_analytics_hint: Helps us measure traffic and improve the product (e.g. Google Analytics / Tag Manager, PostHog, and our first-party marketing events endpoint).
CookieConsent.toggle_functional_hint: Loads the Chatwoot widget so you can contact us from the site. May set cookies or similar storage on Chatwoot’s domain.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
LegalPrivacy.s1_p: This policy describes how Branda (“we”, “us”) processes personal data when you use our website and services. If you are in the European Economic Area (EEA), the UK or Switzerland, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable local laws apply. If you are in Israel, the Privacy Protection Law, 5741-1981 (“PPL”) applies, including the duty to inform data subjects regarding databases where Section 13 notice requirements apply.
LegalPrivacy.s2_p: We may process account and profile details (such as name, email, company/brand name), usage and technical data (such as IP address, device and browser type, pages viewed, timestamps), content you upload for scheduling, marketing attribution data you consent to (such as UTM parameters, approximate location derived from timezone/language, referrer), support communications, and billing-related information where you purchase a paid plan.
LegalPrivacy.s3_p: We process data to provide and secure the service (performance of a contract and legitimate interests in security and fraud prevention); to comply with legal obligations; and, where required, based on your consent (for example non-essential cookies, analytics, and the support chat widget). You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
LegalPrivacy.s4_p: Where personal data are held in a database as defined under Israeli law, eligible data subjects are entitled to receive the information prescribed in law, including whether a database exists, the types of data processed, the purposes of use, the identity of recipients to whom data may be transferred, and how to exercise access rights. You may contact us using the details below to submit a request in accordance with applicable law.
LegalPrivacy.s5_p: We use a consent banner to control non-essential cookies and similar technologies. Essential cookies and storage needed for authentication, security, and basic operation may be used regardless of consent. For analytics and the support widget we rely on your choices as described in the banner and in this policy.
LegalPrivacy.s6_p: We use trusted infrastructure and service providers (for example hosting, authentication, payments, analytics, error monitoring, and customer messaging). They process data only on our instructions and under appropriate contractual safeguards.
LegalPrivacy.s7_p: Your data may be processed in Israel, the EU/EEA, the United States, or other countries where providers operate. Where GDPR applies, we rely on appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses or adequacy decisions, as relevant.
LegalPrivacy.s8_p: We retain personal data only for as long as needed for the purposes described, including legal, accounting, and security requirements, and then delete or anonymise it where possible.
LegalPrivacy.s9_p: Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, data portability, and object to certain processing, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
LegalPrivacy.s10_p: Subject to the PPL and related regulations, you may have the right to access information held about you in a database and, where applicable, request correction or deletion in accordance with the law.
LegalPrivacy.s11_p: The service is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect their personal data.
LegalPrivacy.s12_p: For privacy requests, contact the team at the support email published on the website. We will respond within a reasonable period as required by applicable law.

LegalTerms.title: Terms of Use
LegalTerms.t1_p: By accessing or using Branda, you agree to these Terms and to our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
LegalTerms.t2_p: Branda provides tools to manage social presence, content, analytics, and related features as made available from time to time. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features with reasonable notice where practicable.
LegalTerms.t3_p: You must provide accurate registration information and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for activity under your account.
LegalTerms.t4_p: You must not misuse the service, attempt unauthorised access, interfere with other users, violate third-party platform terms, or use the service for unlawful, harmful, or deceptive activities.
LegalTerms.t5_p: Integrations depend on third-party networks and APIs. We are not responsible for changes, outages, or enforcement actions by those platforms.
LegalTerms.t6_p: We retain rights in the software and branding. You retain rights in your content; you grant us the licence reasonably needed to operate the service for you.
LegalTerms.t7_p: The service is provided “as is” to the fullest extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
LegalTerms.t8_p: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages, or for loss of profits, data, or goodwill. Our aggregate liability arising out of the service is limited to the amounts you paid us in the twelve months before the claim (if any), unless mandatory law provides otherwise.
LegalTerms.t9_p: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Israel, excluding conflict-of-law rules. Courts in Tel-Aviv-Yafo shall have exclusive jurisdiction, subject to mandatory consumer protections in your country of residence where they apply.
LegalTerms.t10_p: We may update these Terms. We will post the revised version and update the “Last updated” date. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.
LegalTerms.t11_p: For legal notices, use the contact details published on the website.
